name: Uncollateralized Overnight Call Rate (policy rate)
notes: BoJ target policy rate. Hiked to 0.50 Jan2025; 0.75 Dec2025; 1.00 Jun2026.

name: JGB Yield 1-Year
notes: MoF reference interest rates (daily) aggregated to monthly.

name: JGB Yield 2-Year
notes: MoF reference interest rates.

name: JGB Yield 5-Year
notes: MoF reference interest rates.

name: JGB Yield 10-Year
notes: Benchmark long-term rate.

name: JGB Yield 30-Year
notes: Super-long maturity.

name: Inflation Expectations 1-Year (composite)
notes: Composite index of inflation expectations (staff-style). Used to deflate nominal rates.

name: Inflation Expectations 3-Year (composite)
notes: Composite index of inflation expectations.

name: Inflation Expectations 10-Year (composite)
notes: Composite index of inflation expectations.

name: Real Interest Rate 1-Year
notes: Nominal 1y minus 1y expected inflation. Short real rate: high impact on activity.

name: Real Interest Rate 3-Year
notes: Medium real rate (3y interpolated). High impact on activity.

name: Real Interest Rate 10-Year
notes: Long real rate. Lower direct impact on activity.

name: Real Policy Rate (policy rate minus 1y expected inflation)
notes: Real ex-ante policy rate. Compared with the natural rate to gauge the policy stance.

name: Real Interest Rate 1-Year (ex-post vs realized core CPI)
notes: Ex-post real 1y: nominal minus realized core CPI y/y. Long history (1974+) for horizon analysis.

name: Real Interest Rate 3-Year (ex-post vs realized core CPI)
notes: Ex-post real 3y (2y-5y interp minus realized core CPI). Long history for horizon analysis.

name: Real Interest Rate 10-Year (ex-post vs realized core CPI)
notes: Ex-post real 10y: nominal minus realized core CPI y/y. Long history (1986+) for horizon analysis.

name: Average Contracted Interest Rate on New Loans
notes: Average contracted rate on new loans and discounts (domestic banks).

name: CP Issuance Rate (3-month a-1 rated)
notes: Commercial paper issuance rate.

name: Corporate Bond Spread (AA 10y over JGB)
notes: Issuance/secondary spread over JGB. Lower spread = more accommodative.

name: Tankan Lending Attitude DI - Large Enterprises
notes: DI = accommodative minus severe. Positive = accommodative.

name: Tankan Lending Attitude DI - Small Enterprises
notes: DI = accommodative minus severe. Positive = accommodative.

name: Tankan Financial Position DI - Large Enterprises
notes: DI = easy minus tight. Positive = easy.

name: Tankan Financial Position DI - Small Enterprises
notes: DI = easy minus tight. Positive = easy.

name: TOPIX Index
notes: Broad equity index. Higher = more accommodative (balance-sheet/wealth channel).

name: Nikkei 225 Index
notes: Headline equity index.

name: USD/JPY Exchange Rate
notes: Higher USDJPY = weaker yen = more accommodative for exporters/profits.

name: Bank Lending Outstanding (y/y %)
notes: Lending by domestic commercial banks (avg amounts outstanding) y/y.

name: CP and Corporate Bonds Outstanding (y/y %)
notes: CP and corporate bonds outstanding (end of period) y/y.

name: Core CPI (ex-fresh food) y/y
notes: MIC CPI core (ex-fresh food). Context for 2% target.

name: Potential Growth Rate
notes: BoJ staff estimate. Key driver of natural rate in structural models.

name: Natural Rate of Interest - Lower Bound
notes: Min across 6 models. ~-0.9pct as of 2025Q3.

name: Natural Rate of Interest - Midpoint
notes: Midpoint of 6-model range. ~-0.2pct as of 2025Q3 (range center).

name: Natural Rate of Interest - Upper Bound
notes: Max across 6 models. ~+0.5pct as of 2025Q3.
